description: Verify that the observer budget state file persists correctly; simulate a budget-exceeded state by writing state with dailyUsd at cap and assert the budget state file exists with the expected fields.

setup.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); fs.mkdirSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge'),{recursive:true}); const now=Date.now(); const day=new Date(now).toISOString().slice(0,10); const hour=new Date(now).toISOString().slice(0,13); const state={dailyUsd:0.0,dailyDate:day,hourlyNarrations:0,hourlyHour:hour}; fs.writeFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','forge-master-observer-state.json'),JSON.stringify(state)); "

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const statePath=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','forge-master-observer-state.json'); const state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(statePath,'utf-8')); if(!('dailyUsd' in state))throw new Error('state missing dailyUsd'); if(!('hourlyNarrations' in state))throw new Error('state missing hourlyNarrations'); if(!('dailyDate' in state))throw new Error('state missing dailyDate'); if(!('hourlyHour' in state))throw new Error('state missing hourlyHour'); console.log('ok observer budget state has required fields');"
